login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your subscriptions

register.subtitle: Create an account to get started

status.registerSuccess: Account created successfully. Please check your email to verify your account. The link is valid for 24 hours.
status.notVerified: Email not verified. Please check your inbox or resend the verification email.
status.verificationFailed: Verification failed. The link may be invalid or expired.
status.verificationSuccess: Email verified successfully. You can now log in.
status.registrationNextSteps: Click the link in the email to verify your account and start managing your subscriptions.
status.forgotPasswordEmailSent: If an account exists for that email address, we've sent a password reset link. Please check your inbox. The link is valid for 1 hour.
status.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
status.passwordResetFailed: Password reset failed. The link may be invalid or expired.

common.backendTimeout: The backend did not respond within 15 seconds. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track and manage your subscription costs
dashboard.monthlyPaymentsDesc: Completed and scheduled payments for the current month
dashboard.noMonthlyPayments: No payments for this month yet.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.subtitle: Manage all your recurring subscriptions
subscriptions.search: Search subscriptions by name or category...
subscriptions.getStarted: Get started by adding your first subscription
subscriptions.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this subscription?
subscriptions.importError: Failed to parse or import JSON file

modal.addDesc: Add a new subscription to track
modal.remindersDesc: Get notified before payment is due

errors.reminderDaysRequired: Reminder days must be between 0 and 30

email.title: Email Notifications
email.enableDesc: Send payment reminders to your email
email.dailyDesc: Receive a summary of today's payments
email.weeklyDesc: Receive a weekly summary of your subscriptions
email.testDesc: Send a sample reminder email to verify your SMTP setup.
email.testBudgetDesc: Send a sample budget alert email using your selected language.
email.testBudgetError: Failed to send test budget email

push.title: Browser Push Notifications
push.desc: Receive alerts directly in your browser
push.enableDesc: Get notified even when you're not on the app

webhook.title: Webhook Integration
webhook.enableDesc: POST payment data to your webhook URL
webhook.urlDesc: We'll send a POST request with payment details to this URL
webhook.secretDesc: Optional secret key to sign the webhook payload. Will be sent in X-Webhook-Signature header.
webhook.testDesc: Send a sample webhook to your configured URL and secret.

default.title: Default Reminder Settings
default.enableDesc: Enable reminders by default for new subscriptions
default.daysDesc: New subscriptions will be set to remind you this many days before the payment is due

categories.title: Category Management
categories.resetConfirm: This will delete all your custom categories and restore the defaults. Are you sure?

localization.title: Localization
localization.currencyDesc: This currency will be used for all your subscriptions
localization.languageDesc: Select your preferred language for the interface

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.accentDesc: Select a primary color for the interface

budget.title: Budget Limits
budget.desc: Set a monthly budget to get notified if you exceed it
budget.label: Monthly Budget
budget.help: Leave blank if you don't want budget alerts

emails.reminder: This is a friendly reminder regarding your {{name}} subscription.
emails.managePrompt: If you wish to manage or cancel this subscription, please log in to your dashboard.
emails.budgetLimitDesc: This is an automated alert to inform you that your total monthly subscription cost has exceeded your configured budget.

digest.summary: Here is a quick summary of your active subscriptions and upcoming payments.

verification.subject: Verify your email - Subscription Tracker
verification.title: Email Verification
verification.text: Thank you for signing up for Subscription Tracker! To complete your registration and start managing your subscriptions, please verify your email address by clicking the button below. The link is valid for 24 hours:
verification.footer: If you didn't create an account, you can safely ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password - Subscription Tracker
passwordReset.title: Password Reset
passwordReset.text: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new password. The link is valid for 1 hour:
passwordReset.footer: If you didn't request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. Your password will not be changed.
